guides.title: Semantic & Vector Search in Adobe AEM with Viglet Turing ES
guides.description: Go beyond keyword search on Adobe Experience Manager content — add embedding-based vector search and semantic navigation with an open-source platform, on your own infrastructure.

guides.title: When to Choose Apache Solr, Elasticsearch, or Viglet Turing ES
guides.description: Raw Solr and Elasticsearch are search engines; Turing ES is an enterprise search platform built on top of them. Here's how to decide which layer you actually need.

guides.title: Viglet Turing ES vs. Coveo vs. Lucidworks Fusion
guides.description: A head-to-head comparison of three enterprise search platforms for large content portals — Coveo, Lucidworks Fusion, and the open-source Viglet Turing ES — on pricing, data residency, connectors, semantic search, and RAG.

guides.title: Open-Source Alternatives to Algolia and Coveo for Adobe AEM
guides.description: Comparing search options for Adobe Experience Manager — Algolia, Coveo, Lucidworks, raw Solr/Elasticsearch, and the open-source Viglet Turing ES. Pricing model, data residency, facets, semantic search, and RAG.

guides.title: How to Add Enterprise Search to Adobe AEM with Viglet Turing ES
guides.description: A step-by-step guide to indexing Adobe Experience Manager content into an open-source enterprise search engine with faceted navigation, semantic search, and RAG — an alternative to Algolia, Coveo, and Lucidworks.
